Bug / Task Description: The top-k tracker evicts the wrong element when the tracked set is full and counts are tied. While scanning for the minimum-count slot to replace, it does not keep the first minimum it found; on a tie it keeps moving the chosen victim, so it can evict a more-frequent or more-recently-correct entry and the resulting top-k set is wrong. Fix the minimum-selection so the intended victim (the first slot achieving the minimum count) is the one replaced, keeping eviction results stable and correct.
Commit Subject: fix(topk): pick a stable minimum when counts tie during eviction
